rule_metadata.name: PE_File_pyinstaller
rule_metadata.author: Didier Stevens (https://DidierStevens.com)
rule_metadata.description: Detect PE file produced by pyinstaller

rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule PE_File_pyinstaller
{
	meta:
		author = "Didier Stevens (https://DidierStevens.com)"
		description = "Detect PE file produced by pyinstaller"
		reference = "https://blog.didierstevens.com/2016/05/16/new-yara-rule-pe_file_pyinstaller/"

	strings:
		$a = "pyi-windows-manifest-filename"

	condition:
		pe.number_of_resources> 0 and $a
}
